topic: simple interest, sequential deposits, account balance
latex:
You deposit $\$1{,}200$ in an account earning $8\%$ simple interest.

\textbf{a.} What is the account balance after 1 year?

\textbf{b.} At the end of the first year, you deposit the balance of the account in a CD (certificate of deposit) earning $8\%$ simple interest. What is the account balance after another year?
